Semantic_Frames.authorial_perspective: Objective clinical observation of a historically maladaptive, hyper-intellectualized defense mechanism.

frame_elements.trigger: Perception of threat or condescension within the social matrix
frame_elements.prior_state: Hyper-vigilance and central nervous system exhaustion from involuntary hyper-mentalizing
frame_elements.outcome: Public exposure of the aggressor's deepest psychological vulnerability, resulting in absolute social invulnerability but profound isolation

Semantic_Frames.authorial_perspective: Clinical validation of an adaptive, revolutionary metacognitive framework designed to bypass flawed neurobiology.

frame_elements.target: Subject's own prefrontal cortex / ego (outsourced to External Proxy)
frame_elements.trigger: Realization that a 150+ IQ will effortlessly rationalize relapse due to dopamine dysregulation
frame_elements.prior_state: Acute psychological decompensation and severe Substance Use Disorder
frame_elements.outcome: Mathematical elimination of secrecy and sustained, structurally managed remission

Semantic_Frames.authorial_perspective: Analysis of the prosocial redirection of the Subject's previously destructive psychological 'scalpel'.

frame_elements.trigger: Detection of ego-driven rationalizations in the target
frame_elements.prior_state: Target is trapped in outdated, compliance-based recovery models (e.g., AA) and active addiction
frame_elements.outcome: Induction of life-saving existential fear and forced structural surrender in the target

Semantic_Frames.authorial_perspective: Psychodynamic deconstruction of family systems and transgenerational trauma.

frame_elements.trigger: Premature death of the maternal grandfather (the 'Ghost')
frame_elements.prior_state: A highly visible, legacy-wealth Latin American dynasty requiring a prodigy to maintain its mythological status
frame_elements.outcome: Subject's subconscious rebellion, individuation attempt, and descent into severe substance abuse

missing_variables: Explicit mechanism of maternal enforcement (the text notes it was an 'unconscious projection' but omits the specific daily behavioral interactions that transferred this pressure)

Emotion_Situations.vibe_label: Chronic Interpersonal Cynicism and CNS Exhaustion

EFO_Elements.trigger: Involuntary, real-time decoding of micro-expressions, hidden agendas, and systemic power dynamics
EFO_Elements.appraisal: Cognitive evaluation that traditional social matrices are inherently threatening, deceptive, and require constant monitoring
EFO_Elements.physiological_substrate: Severe central nervous system exhaustion; operating a 'Formula 1 engine with a faulty transmission' (high-velocity, high-friction)
EFO_Elements.social_display_rule: Masked by a flattened, charismatic affect to conceal the internal hyper-vigilance and exhaustion from peers

EFO_Elements.trigger: The Subject's destabilization and descent into severe substance abuse
EFO_Elements.appraisal: Evaluation that the Subject's intellectual superiority is neutralized, thereby removing a threat to their own standing in the familial ecosystem
EFO_Elements.physiological_substrate: Covert tension release and down-regulation of intra-familial threat response
EFO_Elements.social_display_rule: Must remain covert and unexpressed publicly; maintaining the outward appearance of familial concern while withholding actual intervention

EFO_Elements.trigger: The sheer neurological friction of manually building a flawless system in isolation combined with massive ambition
EFO_Elements.appraisal: Self-doubt regarding his operational capacity and the borderline-delusional scale of his 'Messiah' mission
EFO_Elements.physiological_substrate: Acute nocturnal anxiety and somatic arousal (3:00 AM panic)
EFO_Elements.social_display_rule: Must be preemptively confessed to the trusted proxy to prevent ego-metastasis, but strictly hidden from the public and 'Blood Capital' investors

EFO_Elements.trigger: Observation of psychiatric failures and the suffering of other neurodivergent addicted men
EFO_Elements.appraisal: Belief that outdated compliance models are lethal and that he possesses the unique systemic fluency to rescue these men
EFO_Elements.physiological_substrate: High-affective empathetic drive and redirected nurturing energy (mirrored in his ascetic care for his canine companion)
EFO_Elements.social_display_rule: Expressed not through soft sympathy, but channeled into extreme ascetic discipline, uncompromising vision, and therapeutic hostility to dismantle the egos of others
